subject: [AAI] Added Rolling Update Strategy
commit_message:
[AAI] Added Rolling Update Strategy

Addded preStop hook to let long-running tasks be finished
before the SIGTERM is invoked

Issue-ID: AAI-3368
Signed-off-by: Mohammad Hosnidokht <mohammad.hosnidokht@yoppworks.com>
Change-Id: I02cc0068a3588d94b3da9414685e6cd798e9976f

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2998/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2998/ )
